parameters.query:
SELECT a.*, j.source_url, j.role_family, j.company_id, j.company_display, j.title_normalized
FROM applications a
JOIN jobs j ON a.job_key = j.job_key
WHERE a.application_id = '{{ $json.application_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:
// Field mapping engine.
// Maps known form field labels/names to profile data.
// This runs BEFORE browser automation — it builds the fill plan.
// Browser automation then executes the plan.
// If any field cannot be mapped, flag as novel_question.

const data = $input.first().json;
if (data.error) return [{ json: data }];

const { profile, role_family, company_display, title_normalized, source_url } = data;

// Standard field name → profile key mapping
const FIELD_MAP = {
  // Personal
  'first name': profile.name?.split(' ')[0] || '',
  'last name': profile.name?.split(' ').slice(1).join(' ') || '',
  'full name': profile.name,
  'name': profile.name,
  'email': profile.email,
  'email address': profile.email,
  'phone': profile.phone,
  'phone number': profile.phone,
  'linkedin': profile.linkedin_url,
  'linkedin url': profile.linkedin_url,
  'linkedin profile': profile.linkedin_url,
  'github': profile.github_url,
  'portfolio': profile.portfolio_url,
  'website': profile.portfolio_url,

  // Work Auth
  'work authorization': profile.work_authorization,
  'are you authorized to work': profile.work_authorization === 'us_citizen' ? 'Yes' : 'No',
  'visa sponsorship': profile.requires_sponsorship ? 'Yes' : 'No',
  'require sponsorship': profile.requires_sponsorship ? 'Yes' : 'No',
  'will you now or in the future require': profile.requires_sponsorship ? 'Yes' : 'No',

  // Education
  'university': profile.university,
  'school': profile.university,
  'college': profile.university,
  'degree': profile.degree,
  'major': profile.major,
  'gpa': profile.gpa !== null ? String(profile.gpa) : '',
  'graduation date': profile.graduation_month,
  'expected graduation': profile.graduation_month,

  // Dates
  'start date': profile.common_answers?.earliest_start_date,
  'earliest start date': profile.common_answers?.earliest_start_date,
  'end date': profile.common_answers?.latest_end_date,
  'availability': `${profile.common_answers?.earliest_start_date} to ${profile.common_answers?.latest_end_date}`,
  'hours per week': profile.common_answers?.hours_per_week,

  // Demographic (voluntary)
  'gender': profile.common_answers?.gender,
  'ethnicity': profile.common_answers?.ethnicity,
  'race': profile.common_answers?.ethnicity,
  'veteran': profile.common_answers?.veteran_status,
  'disability': profile.common_answers?.disability_status,
  'pronouns': profile.common_answers?.preferred_pronouns,
  'how did you hear': profile.common_answers?.how_did_you_hear,
  'how did you find': profile.common_answers?.how_did_you_hear,

  // Short answers
  'why are you interested in': profile.short_answer_templates?.why_company,
  'why this company': profile.short_answer_templates?.why_company,
  'why do you want to work': profile.short_answer_templates?.why_company,
  'why this role': profile.short_answer_templates?.why_role,
  'why this position': profile.short_answer_templates?.why_role,
  'describe a project': profile.short_answer_templates?.projects,
  'tell us about a project': profile.short_answer_templates?.projects,
  'career goals': profile.short_answer_templates?.career_goals,
  'strengths': profile.short_answer_templates?.strengths,
  'what are your strengths': profile.short_answer_templates?.strengths,
  'diversity': profile.short_answer_templates?.diversity_statement,
};

return [{ json: {
  ...data,
  fill_plan: FIELD_MAP,
  fill_plan_ready: true
} }];

parameters.query:
UPDATE applications SET
  draft_status = '{{ $json.draft_status }}',
  form_checkpoint = '{{ $json.form_checkpoint }}',
  novel_questions = '{{ $json.novel_questions }}',
  last_error = '{{ $json.last_error }}'
WHERE application_id = '{{ $json.application_id }}';
